heading: Am I Underpaid?
subheading: Discover your Market Compensation Alignment (MCA) Score.
subheading-context: Stop guessing. We combine official ONS benchmarks with over 700,000 live UK job listings to calculate your definitive MCA Score in seconds.
privacy-note: Your privacy matters. The information provided above is used solely to generate your results.

why.heading: Why calculate your MCA Score?
why.body: In the rapidly shifting {year} UK job market, knowing your exact {benchmarks} is essential. Our MCA Score breaks down your pay against your direct peers, national averages, and live market demand, giving you the transparency you need to negotiate with confidence.

data.heading: Powered by a Triangulated Data Engine
data.body: We don't just show you generic national averages. Our engine cross-references official data from the {bureau} with thousands of live, regional job listings. This dynamic {comparison} ensures your score reflects real-world UK economic conditions today.

benchmark.heading: Benchmark My Role
benchmark.subheading: Looking to hire? Ensure your offer stands out.
benchmark.subheading-context: BenchmarkMyRole compares your open roles against live market vacancies and official ONS benchmarks. Generate an MCA Score for your job descriptions to ensure you are offering a highly competitive package to top talent.
